name: sentinel-lp-range-rebalancer
description: Automated LP position rebalancing for Uniswap V3 on 0G Galileo. Monitors the current pool tick against the registered position range and triggers a rebalance when the position falls out of range and stops earning fees.

trigger.description: Polls Uniswap V3 pool slot0() to detect when current tick moves outside the LP position range

conditions.description: Current pool tick has moved outside the LP position's registered tick range

actions.description: Remove liquidity from the out-of-range position and re-add it centered around the current tick with the same range width
